title: Notification No.34/2002-CE (N.T)
text: 1 st October , 2002 Notification No. 34 /2002-Central Excise (N.T). In pursuance of paragraph 2 of the notification of the Government of India, erstwhile Ministry of Finance, (Department of Revenue), No.14/2002-Central Excise (N.T.) dated the 8 th March, 2002[( G.S.R. 182 -(E) dated the 8 th March, 2002)]the Central Board of Customs and Excise notifies that the said notification shall come into effect on and from the 25 th day of October, 2002. M.G.Thamizh Valavan Under Secretary to the Government of India F.No.208/38/2001-CX.6 Note: The Principal Notification was published in the Gazette of India vide notification No.14/2002-Central Excise (N.T.) dated the 8 th March, 2002 (G.S.R. 182 (E) dated the 8 th March, 2002) and was last amended vide notification No.22/2002-Central Excise (N.T.) dated the 5 th June, 2002 (G.S.R.403 (E) dated the 5 th June, 2002). -- 1 of 1 --
